title: Anpanman Kotoba Zukan DX — talking pen and book
description: Anpanman Kotoba Zukan DX talking book and pen — battery contacts, switch, and connector work after patient disassembly and testing to clear an intermittent sound fault.
itemDetails:
Sega Toys (Sega Fave) Anpanman Kotoba Zukan DX (Word Encyclopedia DX; 2017): white briefcase-style electronic book with orange handle, cover art of Anpanman and friends, and a yellow Anpanman-head touch pen.

Touch illustrations to hear Japanese words and English phrases; about 2,200 vocabulary entries, character voices, quiz and song modes, and picture pages inside. Power is typically 2× AA; later Super DX and Premium revisions added more content and recording features.
repairDetails:
This Sega Toys Anpanman Kotoba Zukan DX set came in with an intermittent fault — sometimes the talking pen and book responded to the pages, sometimes not, which made the problem harder to pin down.

We disassembled the pen and book case, cleaned and rebuilt the battery contacts, replaced a tired switch and connector, and worked through trial-and-error testing until touch prompts and vocabulary sounds played consistently again.

googleReview.quote: I couldn't be happier with the service provided. We have a reading pen for a Japanese/English children's book that had stopped working. I had no idea and it would have been way expensive to replace. The Toy Doctor was able to track down the fault and repair it so we can enjoy the book again.
